da.text:
🧘 200-timers Yogalæreruddannelse hos Yoga Bible

Vi tilbyder Yoga Alliance-certificerede 200HR uddannelser i hjertet af København — vælg mellem 3 formater:

⚡ 4 uger intensiv
📅 8 uger semi-intensiv
🌿 18 uger fleksibel

Send '4UGER', '8UGER' eller '18UGER' for detaljer om hvert format.

Eller se det fulde overblik her 👇

en.text:
🧘 200-Hour Yoga Teacher Training at Yoga Bible

We offer Yoga Alliance-certified 200HR trainings in the heart of Copenhagen — choose from 3 formats:

⚡ 4-week intensive
📅 8-week semi-intensive
🌿 18-week flexible

Send '4WEEKS', '8WEEKS' or '18WEEKS' for details on each format.

Or see the full overview here 👇

da.text:
⚡ 4 Ugers Intensiv Yogalæreruddannelse

Vores mest fokuserede format — fuld immersion over 4 uger i København.

✅ 200HR Yoga Alliance-certificeret
✅ Daglig undervisning mandag–fredag
✅ Lille holdstørrelse
✅ Perfekt til dig der vil fordybe dig 100%

Næste hold starter snart — se datoer og priser 👇

en.text:
⚡ 4-Week Intensive Yoga Teacher Training

Our most focused format — full immersion over 4 weeks in Copenhagen.

✅ 200HR Yoga Alliance certified
✅ Daily classes Monday–Friday
✅ Small group sizes
✅ Perfect if you want 100% dedication

Next cohort starting soon — see dates and pricing 👇

da.text:
📅 8 Ugers Semi-Intensiv Yogalæreruddannelse

Den perfekte balance mellem fordybelse og fleksibilitet — 8 uger i København.

✅ 200HR Yoga Alliance-certificeret
✅ Undervisning på udvalgte dage
✅ Tid til integration mellem moduler
✅ Ideel hvis du arbejder ved siden af

Se datoer og priser 👇

en.text:
📅 8-Week Semi-Intensive Yoga Teacher Training

The perfect balance between immersion and flexibility — 8 weeks in Copenhagen.

✅ 200HR Yoga Alliance certified
✅ Classes on selected days
✅ Time for integration between modules
✅ Ideal if you're working alongside

See dates and pricing 👇

da.text:
🌿 18 Ugers Fleksibel Yogalæreruddannelse

Vores mest fleksible format — uddannelsen over 18 uger med plads til dit liv.

✅ 200HR Yoga Alliance-certificeret
✅ Weekendundervisning
✅ Masser af tid til praksis og integration
✅ Perfekt til dig med job og familie

Se datoer og priser 👇

en.text:
🌿 18-Week Flexible Yoga Teacher Training

Our most flexible format — training over 18 weeks with room for your life.

✅ 200HR Yoga Alliance certified
✅ Weekend classes
✅ Plenty of time for practice and integration
✅ Perfect if you have work and family

See dates and pricing 👇

da.text:
🔥 300-Timers Avanceret Yogalæreruddannelse

Tag din praksis og undervisning til næste niveau med vores 300HR uddannelse.

✅ Yoga Alliance 300HR certificeret
✅ Bygger videre på din 200HR
✅ Avanceret anatomi, filosofi og undervisningsmetoder
✅ Bliv RYT-500 certificeret

Læs mere 👇

en.text:
🔥 300-Hour Advanced Yoga Teacher Training

Take your practice and teaching to the next level with our 300HR training.

✅ Yoga Alliance 300HR certified
✅ Builds on your 200HR foundation
✅ Advanced anatomy, philosophy and teaching methods
✅ Become RYT-500 certified

Learn more 👇

da.text:
✨ Kurser & Workshops hos Yoga Bible

Udover vores uddannelser tilbyder vi specialiserede kurser:

🤸 Inversions — Håndstand, headstand, armbalancer
🌈 Backbends — Dybe bagoverbøjninger og hjerteåbnere
🧘 Splits — Fleksibilitet og spagat

Send 'INVERSIONS', 'BACKBENDS' eller 'SPLITS' for detaljer.

Eller se alle kurser 👇

en.text:
✨ Courses & Workshops at Yoga Bible

Beyond our trainings, we offer specialized courses:

🤸 Inversions — Handstands, headstands, arm balances
🌈 Backbends — Deep backbends and heart openers
🧘 Splits — Flexibility and splits training

Send 'INVERSIONS', 'BACKBENDS' or 'SPLITS' for details.

Or see all courses 👇

da.text:
🤸 Inversions Kursus

Lær håndstand, headstand og armbalancer i et trygt og progressivt miljø.

✅ Trin-for-trin progression
✅ Styrke- og teknikopbygning
✅ Velegnet for alle niveauer
✅ Lille holdstørrelse

Se næste kursusstart 👇

en.text:
🤸 Inversions Course

Learn handstands, headstands and arm balances in a safe, progressive environment.

✅ Step-by-step progression
✅ Strength and technique building
✅ Suitable for all levels
✅ Small group sizes

See next course start 👇

da.text:
🌈 Backbends Kursus

Fordyb dig i bagoverbøjninger — fra bridge til fuld wheel og videre.

✅ Sikker progression
✅ Åbn bryst og skuldre
✅ Styrk ryggens fleksibilitet
✅ Alle niveauer velkomne

Se næste kursusstart 👇

en.text:
🌈 Backbends Course

Dive deep into backbends — from bridge to full wheel and beyond.

✅ Safe progression
✅ Open chest and shoulders
✅ Strengthen spinal flexibility
✅ All levels welcome

See next course start 👇

da.text:
🧘 Splits & Fleksibilitet Kursus

Systematisk fleksibilitetstræning med fokus på spagat og dybe stræk.

✅ Progressiv tilgang
✅ Aktiv og passiv fleksibilitet
✅ Forebyg skader
✅ Alle niveauer

Se næste kursusstart 👇

en.text:
🧘 Splits & Flexibility Course

Systematic flexibility training focused on splits and deep stretches.

✅ Progressive approach
✅ Active and passive flexibility
✅ Injury prevention
✅ All levels

See next course start 👇

da.text:
🌟 Mentorship & Privat Træning

Skræddersyet en-til-en undervisning med Yoga Bibles erfarne lærere.

✅ Personligt tilpasset program
✅ Fleksibel planlægning
✅ Fordybelse i dit fokusområde
✅ Online eller i studiet

Læs mere om mulighederne 👇

en.text:
🌟 Mentorship & Private Training

Tailored one-on-one instruction with Yoga Bible's experienced teachers.

✅ Personally customized program
✅ Flexible scheduling
✅ Deep dive into your focus area
✅ Online or in-studio

Learn more about the options 👇

da.text:
🙏 Hej og velkommen til Yoga Bible!

Vi er en yogalæreruddannelsesskole i hjertet af København. Her er hvad du kan skrive for at få info:

🧘 '200HR' — Yogalæreruddannelse
⚡ '4UGER' — 4 ugers intensiv
📅 '8UGER' — 8 ugers semi-intensiv
🌿 '18UGER' — 18 ugers fleksibel
🔥 '300HR' — Avanceret uddannelse
✨ 'KURSER' — Workshops & kurser
🌟 'MENTORSHIP' — Privat træning
📋 'SKEMA' — Klasseoversigt
💰 'PRIS' — Priser
📝 'ANSØG' — Ansøg nu
🎵 'MUSIK' — Playlister

Hvad kan vi hjælpe med? 😊

en.text:
🙏 Hi and welcome to Yoga Bible!

We're a yoga teacher training school in the heart of Copenhagen. Here's what you can type to get info:

🧘 '200HR' — Yoga teacher training
⚡ '4WEEKS' — 4-week intensive
📅 '8WEEKS' — 8-week semi-intensive
🌿 '18WEEKS' — 18-week flexible
🔥 '300HR' — Advanced training
✨ 'COURSES' — Workshops & courses
🌟 'MENTORSHIP' — Private training
📋 'SCHEDULE' — Class schedule
💰 'PRICE' — Pricing
📝 'APPLY' — Apply now
🎵 'MUSIC' — Playlists

How can we help? 😊
